creator: Cy.Schubert@komquats.com
text:
Hi Ronald,

mhn.defaults is dynamically generated (ie. my mhn.defaults does not contain 
the references).

Please send me a copy of your mhn.defaults file.

Please send a copy of pkg_info -aI and a copy of pkg_info -ao output as 
well.


-- 
Cheers,
Cy Schubert <Cy.Schubert@komquats.com>
